notes: Artifacts under data/models are external/ignored base inputs and are not promotion evidence.
Official Phase4 snapshot has zero exposure; CVaR is not economic robustness.
Research baseline artifacts remain research-only.

phase5_research_only_stage_a_nonzero_exposure_falsification_gate abandoned the Stage A nonzero-exposure thesis because safe ex-ante top1 had negative median combo Sharpe and the strong result required realized eligibility.
phase5_research_sandbox_nonzero_exposure_cvar_evaluation_gate added a research-only CVaR evaluator with nonzero sandbox exposure, max CVaR95 loss fraction 0.01072844, and no official promotion.
phase5_research_dsr_zero_diagnostic_gate explained DSR=0.0 as a 3.5892 Sharpe gap to sr_needed under n_trials_honest=5000; diagnostic only, no promotion.
phase5_research_rank_score_threshold_sizing_falsification_gate found weak positive median alpha for top1_score_ge_0_50, but min combo Sharpe remained negative and no promotion is allowed.
phase5_research_rank_score_stability_correction_gate consumed the one allowed correction for the threshold-family line and abandoned it because negative min combo Sharpe and DSR gap remained.

phase5_research_hypothesis_space_freeze_gate froze the current autonomous research hypothesis space with zero promotable candidates and two surviving diagnostic/evaluation modules under the previous budget.
phase5_research_deep_quant_diagnostic_gate decomposed DSR, SR_needed, subperiods, drawdown, turnover proxy and policy sensitivity; diagnostic only.
phase5_research_alternative_exante_family_gate abandoned the p_bma/sigma/hmm long-only family because best median combo Sharpe was -0.632456.
phase5_research_signal_polarity_long_short_gate found a positive research-only short-high signal polarity candidate but required stability correction.
phase5_research_signal_polarity_stability_correction_gate passed as a stable research-only survivor: short_high_p_bma_k3_p60_h70, median Sharpe 1.361592, min Sharpe 0.261111, max CVaR95 0.00344841.
phase5_research_full_phase_family_comparison_gate selected the signal-polarity survivor as research-only and explicitly blocked official promotion.
phase5_research_candidate_global_reaudit_gate confirmed short_high_p_bma_k3_p60_h70 was ex-ante valid as research/sandbox only and still below sr_needed.
phase5_research_candidate_stability_gate found PARTIAL/correct evidence: 29 of 49 stability scenarios failed, including temporal thirds and 20 bps cost stress.
phase5_research_candidate_falsification_gate abandoned the candidate because temporal_subperiod_min_sharpe=-1.160839 and extra_cost_20bps_min_sharpe=-0.12201 were hard falsifiers.
phase5_research_candidate_decision_gate classified the candidate as RESEARCH_CANDIDATE_FALSIFIED; no official promotion, paper readiness, A3/A4 reopening or threshold relaxation occurred.
phase5_post_candidate_falsification_global_reaudit_gate confirmed the prior survivor was falsified and selected cluster_conditioned_polarity as the next safe in-repo thesis.
phase5_research_cluster_conditioned_polarity_gate generated nonzero research/sandbox exposure and candidate cluster_2_long_high_short_low_p60_h70_k3, but no official promotion.
phase5_research_cluster_conditioned_polarity_falsification_gate abandoned the cluster-conditioned candidate after temporal, cost, parameter and universe falsifiers.
phase5_post_candidate_falsification_governed_freeze_gate reached FULL_FREEZE_AFTER_REAUDIT after five material families with zero surviving promotable candidates.
Before accepting permanent final freeze, AUTONOMOUS_RESEARCH_AGENDA_EXPANSION must run via sniper-autonomous-research-agenda-synthesizer and create the planned reports/state agenda files.
If the agenda generates no HIGH/MEDIUM executable hypothesis, classify FULL_FREEZE_AFTER_REAUDIT_AND_AGENDA_EXHAUSTED.
AUTONOMOUS_RESEARCH_AGENDA_EXPANSION generated sniper_research_agenda.yaml, sniper_hypothesis_inventory.md and sniper_next_autonomous_mission.md.

phase5_research_meta_disagreement_abstention_gate found research/sandbox candidate short_bma_high_meta_low_p60_m40_k3 with median Sharpe 0.855486, min Sharpe 0.220622, median active days 322.0 and max CVaR95 0.00455141.

phase5_research_meta_disagreement_stability_falsification_gate falsified short_bma_high_meta_low_p60_m40_k3 with 25 hard falsifiers, including temporal thirds, 20 bps cost stress, parameter sensitivity and universe stress.

phase5_research_meta_disagreement_candidate_decision_gate classified the candidate as META_DISAGREEMENT_RESEARCH_CANDIDATE_FALSIFIED and selected AGENDA-H02 / phase5_research_meta_uncertainty_abstention_gate as the next materially different agenda hypothesis.

phase5_research_meta_uncertainty_abstention_gate classified AGENDA-H02 as META_UNCERTAINTY_FALSIFIED_BY_STABILITY_STRESS with 19 hard falsifiers and selected AGENDA-H03 / phase5_research_cvar_constrained_meta_sizing_gate as the next materially different agenda hypothesis.

AUTONOMOUS_CHECKPOINT_CONTINUATION_POLICY treats large reviewable packages as CHECKPOINT_CONTINUE_AUTONOMOUS, not final stops, when validation passes and reports/state/sniper_next_autonomous_mission.md defines a safe next gate.

phase5_research_cvar_constrained_meta_sizing_gate classified AGENDA-H03 as CVAR_CONSTRAINED_META_SIZING_CVAR_PASS_ALPHA_UNSTABLE. The best research/sandbox policy signed_meta_edge_t52_s15_k5_g04 had nonzero exposure, median Sharpe 2.040444, max CVaR95 0.00356911 and median active days 698.0, but min Sharpe -0.903026 and 20 hard falsifiers block preservation. Next gate is AGENDA-H04 / phase5_research_regime_specific_meta_disagreement_gate.
